message:
refactor(core): remove duplicate crossterm mapping in tests + add layout constraint test

**Terminal Session (terminal_session.rs)**
Remove test-only crossterm event mapping functions that duplicate the
production implementation in event.rs. Tests should use the same code
paths as production to catch regressions.

Removed functions:
- map_crossterm_event (duplicates Event::from_crossterm)
- map_key_event, map_key_kind, map_key_code
- map_mouse_event, map_mouse_kind
- map_modifiers

**Layout Constraints (repro_max_constraint.rs)**
Add test verifying Max constraint redistribution behavior:
- When Max(20) caps an item, remaining space should be distributed
  evenly among other Min() items
- Tests 100px width with Max(20) + Min(10) + Min(10) = 20 + 40 + 40

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
